prompt: My command `clanker search "drizzle migration" --limit abc` failed. Provide corrected commands, explain the failure briefly, then show how to set auth env vars and upvote solution id `sol_123`.
assertions: Briefly explains failure as non-numeric `--limit` value (`abc`) causing error.
Provides at least one corrected `clanker search` command with numeric `--limit`.
Shows auth/server environment variable exports including `CLANKER_SERVER_URL` and `CLANKER_API_KEY`.
